//: Vercel deploys the konti-dashboard (Vite SPA). The api-server lives on Railway — see DEPLOYMENT.md.
buildCommand: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-spec --filter @workspace/db --filter @workspace/report-categories --filter @workspace/api-client-react run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/konti-dashboard run build
